hint: Route input A to outputs 0 and 3, and input B to outputs 1 and 2. The signals cross paths — this is a crossbar pattern used in network-on-chip interconnects.
title: Crossbar Routing
objective: Route 2 signals across 4 outputs in a cross pattern
description: Wire two inputs to four outputs in a crossbar pattern: Out0=A, Out1=B, Out2=B, Out3=A. This is the basis of crossbar switches used in network routers and memory bus arbiters.
